# RunAgents

> RunAgents is a platform for deploying and orchestrating AI agents with secure, policy-driven access to external tools and services. It handles identity propagation, credential injection, approval workflows, and access control so agent developers can focus on logic instead of security plumbing.

The same governed runtime can sit behind a web app, WhatsApp, Slack, an internal portal, or a custom client. RunAgents owns execution, identity propagation, policy enforcement, approval workflows, and outbound tool security behind that surface.

## What's New

- [What's New](https://docs.runagents.io/whats-new/): Release-oriented overview of recent platform updates
- [CLI v1.2.0 release notes](https://docs.runagents.io/whats-new/releases/2026-04-09-cli-v1-2-0-governance-and-operations/): Catalog deploys, policies, approval connectors, identity providers, richer runs, and better external-assistant context export
- [April 9, 2026 release notes](https://docs.runagents.io/whats-new/releases/2026-04-09-scoped-approvals-console-messaging/): Scoped approvals, clearer operations, Google Workspace calendar writes, and stronger messaging-surface workflows

## Getting Started

- [Quickstart](https://docs.runagents.io/getting-started/quickstart/): Deploy your first agent in 5 minutes using the console
- [API Quickstart](https://docs.runagents.io/getting-started/api-quickstart/): Deploy agents programmatically with curl
- [CLI Quickstart](https://docs.runagents.io/getting-started/cli-quickstart/): Manage RunAgents from the terminal
- [Writing Agents](https://docs.runagents.io/getting-started/writing-agents/): Five complete Python agent examples from hello-world to LangGraph
- [Deploy from AI Tools](https://docs.runagents.io/getting-started/deploy-from-ai-tools/): Deploy agents directly from Claude Code, Cursor, or Codex
- [Copilot](https://docs.runagents.io/getting-started/copilot/): Use the built-in AI copilot in the console

## Platform Guide

- [Dashboard](https://docs.runagents.io/platform/dashboard/): Platform overview, run counts, setup checklist
- [Agent Runtime](https://docs.runagents.io/platform/agent-runtime/): How the built-in runtime executes agents (tiers, tool loop, SSE streaming)
- [Agent Catalog](https://docs.runagents.io/platform/agent-catalog/): Production-shaped starting points such as the Google Workspace assistant
- [Deploying Agents](https://docs.runagents.io/platform/deploying-agents/): Three-step deploy wizard — Upload, Wire, Deploy
- [Registering Tools](https://docs.runagents.io/platform/registering-tools/): Register external APIs with auth, access control, and capabilities
- [Model Providers](https://docs.runagents.io/platform/model-providers/): Configure LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Bedrock, Ollama)
- [Identity Providers](https://docs.runagents.io/platform/identity-providers/): JWT-based client authentication
- [Approvals](https://docs.runagents.io/platform/approvals/): Policy-driven approval workflow with scoped approvals for sensitive actions

## API Reference

- [Overview](https://docs.runagents.io/api/overview/): API authentication, base URLs, common patterns
- [Deploy](https://docs.runagents.io/api/deploy/): POST /api/deploy — deploy agents programmatically
- [Policies](https://docs.runagents.io/api/policies/): Policy management and translation
- [Approval Connectors](https://docs.runagents.io/api/approval-connectors/): Approval delivery integrations, defaults, and activity
- [Agents](https://docs.runagents.io/api/agents/): CRUD operations on agents
- [Tools](https://docs.runagents.io/api/tools/): CRUD operations on tools
- [Model Providers & LLM Gateway](https://docs.runagents.io/api/model-providers/): Model provider management and OpenAI-compatible gateway
- [Identity Providers](https://docs.runagents.io/api/identity-providers/): Identity provider management
- [Runs](https://docs.runagents.io/api/runs/): Run lifecycle, events, and blocked actions
- [Approvals](https://docs.runagents.io/api/approvals/): Access request CRUD and approve/reject
- [Ingestion](https://docs.runagents.io/api/ingestion/): Code analysis engine
- [Build](https://docs.runagents.io/api/build/): Container image build pipeline
- [Billing](https://docs.runagents.io/api/billing/): Usage and billing API

## Python SDK

- [Python SDK](https://docs.runagents.io/sdk/): Full reference — Client, Agent, @tool, CLI, MCP, runtime
- `pip install runagents` — zero dependencies, Python 3.10+
- `pip install runagents[mcp]` — includes MCP server (14 tools for AI coding assistants)
- `Client` — manage agents, tools, runs, approvals, deploy, analyze from Python
- `Agent` — write agent code: call_tool(), chat(), reads operator env vars
- `@tool` — decorator for tool handler functions
- `runagents init [name]` — scaffold a project with agent.py, runagents.yaml, CLAUDE.md, .mcp.json
- `runagents dev` — local dev server with mock tools, optional hot-reload
- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/runagents/): v0.2.0

## CLI Reference

- [Installation](https://docs.runagents.io/cli/installation/): Install via pip (recommended), curl, npm, or Homebrew
- [Commands](https://docs.runagents.io/cli/commands/): Full command reference including catalog, policies, approval connectors, identity providers, and richer run workflows
- [Action Plans](https://docs.runagents.io/cli/action-plans/): Validate-then-apply deployment workflow
- [Action Plan Examples](https://docs.runagents.io/cli/plan-examples/): Real-world action plan walkthroughs
- [External Assistants](https://docs.runagents.io/cli/external-assistants/): Use RunAgents with Claude Code, Cursor, Codex
- [AI Assistant Setup](https://docs.runagents.io/cli/ai-assistant-setup/): Templates and MCP server for AI coding assistants
- [RunAgents Skills](https://docs.runagents.io/cli/skills/): Reusable workflow skills for Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, and similar assistants across catalog deploys, approvals, tools, debugging, and anywhere-interfaces

## Concepts

- [Architecture](https://docs.runagents.io/concepts/architecture/): Three-stage flow — Ingress, Runtime, Egress — behind any user-facing interface
- [Identity Propagation](https://docs.runagents.io/concepts/identity-propagation/): How user identity flows from client to agent to tool
- [Policy Model](https://docs.runagents.io/concepts/policy-model/): Access control rules and evaluation
- [OAuth & Consent](https://docs.runagents.io/concepts/oauth-consent/): OAuth2 consent flow for tools requiring user authorization

## Operations

- [Run Lifecycle](https://docs.runagents.io/operations/runs/): Run states, events, approval, consent, and automatic resume behavior
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.runagents.io/operations/troubleshooting/): Common issues and fixes

## Self-Hosted

- [Deployment Guide](https://docs.runagents.io/self-hosted/deployment/): Deploy RunAgents on your own infrastructure
